## Discussion notes

- Nuro SOW signed; pilot kicking off; first delivery committed within 30 days.
- Acko BIS NOC contingency Plan B in design; mid-to-late May realistic re-window.
- Atlas Waymo scaling becoming a real load — self-serve discussion to revisit Q3.
